item.title: this post was uploaded by someone else on imgur forever ago, and I had it up on my tabs for at least 2 years to remind myself to take deep breaths and enjoy the breeze, but it was removed so now I'm uploading it.
item.dc:creator: MissNeko

item.title: The 413th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Hot
Cheese
That's not really permanently, then.
OC at the bottom
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Phone_Dump #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

There’s a great puppet history video about this one
Me when I meet someone who likes newsies
This is for my boyfriend- I don’t particularly love basketball
LOOK
I’m sorry
I’m sorry x2
Scruffy and Froggy tax
The wiener tax
This is got my boyfriend too- I hate this dog. Her name is Dolly and she’s terrible
SHES A MOTHERRRRR- Nessie tax

item.title: I started hormones x.x
item.description: 2014 - 2024 started last summer.. stuff is hard and it feels like I started too late sometimes but im a lot happier than I was the last 6-7 years and ive met a bunch of great people since I moved to the west coast that have been really supportive ^.^

item.title: Time for another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
looks fine to me
but not work computer
a little earlier than that for me
tape deck looks like a futurama robot
this sounds terrifying
mmm hmm
nah, there's gotta be at least 1% cat
more should be aware
tough to beat a beaver with a jetpack
i need to see the numbers
it's true, it is all about that
what other vibes are there?
knew that already
don't we all
thank you Gustave
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bBvIZqpp7DU
that sounds bad
that’s it for me. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Oh lawd he coming, but with memes
item.description:
PSA
Where you at?
Funge is a great word.
Makes a lot of sense, actually.
I agree with fan-arter.
Mmmm....whoreos
Yeah, but then? Then it's gonna be the holidays and I won't have time to do shit.
?
Also ?
I think that's just the emotions that come with olive garden.
Unpasteurized vomit has never tasted so good.
National treasure. He also said if he pitched against Babe Ruth he'd plunk him in the ass. https://www.nbcnews.com/id/wbna6244105
I remember the old ways. The long long ago.

item.dc:creator: IchigoberriGamer

item.title: We finally did the thing :) Puppy overload.
item.description:
So, I've wanted a dog since my childhood dog died. But for this reason and that reason (mostly landlords and finances and jobs etc) we haven't ever gotten one. So we've been talking about it more and more and our landlord recently said he didn't care what type of dog he was just try not to go over 70 lb.
Meet Fantus (the pup previously known as Murtagh) I had a doctor's appt and saw the humane society on the way. "I'll just stop by." I thought... as if I wouldn't obviously fall in love with every animal in sight.
Wellll I met a bunch of puppies and they were all wonderful but Murtagh was a shy, sweet little cuddle bug who melted into my arms the first time I held him.
So I brought my husband and son back to meet him. And this was the moment he grabbed the adoption application out of my purse and carried it over. Volume up for my son saying "now we have to take him home!"
So he came home with us. For our 13 years of marriage we've talked about getting a dog and we still managed to get one without being prepped at all because I can't resist a cutie face.
Hobbes, however, was NOT impressed.
"wtf is this thing and when can I kill it?" Hobbes, definitely.
Look at that tail lol.
Shy, sweet little friend is actually not shy at all and is a bundle of trouble and I adore every inch of his wriggly self.
He is DETERMINED to be friends with Hobbes, who would like nothing to do with him unless he's sleeping, in which case he would like to investigate him with disdainful sniffing.
It took us like 3 days to settle on a name. We went through a bunch. My son wanted a dragon name, and my husband wanted a good book character, so we ended up naming him Fantus after the firedrake in Riftwar by Raymond E Feist
My son wanted to name him, among other things, Puppin and Dr Bone. So his full name is Fantus Puppin Bone - redacted-
His ears and eyebrows are the best things on earth. Also um I think the shelter was not accurate about him probably being under 70 lb. Look at those paws.
Hobbes has gotten semi tolerant inside but through the door he is full of righteous fury.
Observing the intruder from the stairs.
Chewing anything and everything he can reach.
LOOK AT THIS FUCKING ANGEL
LOOK AT THIS FUCKING DEMON. (I love him equally and I promise he has been getting tons of extra treats and attention as well as many spaces to retreat to)
Fantus loves to nap as hard as he plays.
Unaware of danger.
More disdainful observations.
"Fine i will tolerate it when it sleeps"
I am absolutely living this meme.
Unstaged but I definitely tried to make it look like the comic when I saw it happen hahaha.
Who wants to bet they will be buddies soon? I hope so, anyway.
Who could resist this little Puppin
He must find EVERY soft surface to snuggle on. Obsessed with burrowing into pillows
THE EARS.
I'm in love and obsessed and I hope y'all will enjoy my new taxes when I ever have time to post a meme dump again. :) Happy Wednesday, friends.
item.dc:creator: kaeldra

Posted twice. Don't know why
You have reached the end. Rest now, weary traveler

item.title: Scared to sleep
item.description: Thought we were taking our baby girl home today. Pediatrician noticed she was breathing more rapidly than they would like. Blood test came back with markers indicative of infection (sepsis) so she was admitted to the NICU. This is baby 2/2 admitted to the NICU for us. Our first was admitted immediately after birth 2yrs ago. Full term good sized babies and we just can’t escape it. I’m scared to sleep for fear she won’t be there when I wake up.
item.dc:creator: DeadlyPaws

item.title: You look like you need an uplifting dump.
item.description: Holy crap this one turned out controversial. People please. Can't you just appreciate the fact that they got help from people for no other reason than wanting to help? Stop bitching about her not helping or the guy having bought the wrong mover or even "shouldn't have bought such a big plot then". Sjeez...
item.dc:creator: cosonfused

item.title: Yeah, it's just an Orange thing :)
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: Me before getting really sick
item.description: lol and me now. Granted I was sick back then too, but the disease I have is a bit of a slow burn. I gradually got worse and worse and the last few months/about a year have been the worst. It seems like it’s exponentially worse to be honest. I miss who I was. I feel like I am a hollow shell of myself now, as I don’t do anything for fun or for enjoyment. Everything I do is for survival or to ease symptoms. I have lost all my friendships, had to move far away and i’ve become totally isolated and lost basically everything i owned. I just have my two little rat bois. I hold on for better days, ya know? I’ve battled a lot with my mental health my entire adult life, and feeling very very sick will mess with that too. Like what is the point of anything. I look back on these pictures where I would like actually do my hair and makeup and go do things lol and I can’t remember the last time I did that. Maybe all of this should indeed be shared with a therapist instead of the internet- but given that my insurance is lapsed at the moment, I can’t. So pls be nice to me or I will cry. Or downvote me and tell me to KMS, whatever u wanna do I don’t care If anyone feels inclined to maybe help me out though to afford my life I have PayPal, it’s @agoodmess Email is agoodmess1994@gmail.com I can offer rat photos as tax in exchange but that’s about all I can do. I don’t have my iPad or any art supplies to even draw ?‍? yeah I used to draw. Wtf. Anyways. Thanks for reading
item.dc:creator: cantw82D1E

item.title: Random Stolen Meme Dumpp
item.description: FP Edit: Thank you and enjoy your weekend! As always, if you want learn how you can use your CPU/GPU power to help scientists develop new medicines then check out Folding@home: “Install our software to become a citizen scientist and contribute your compute power to help fight global health threats like COVID19, Alzheimer’s Disease, and cancer. Our software is completely free, easy to install, and safe to use.” - www.foldingathome.org Do your part and join up now!
item.dc:creator: PWNRSH1P
